name: ABM Beignets
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except sugar in the bread machine.
2. Program for knead and first rise, then start.
The dough will be sticky at first but will hold its shape.
3. After the final cycle, it will be workable. When dough is finished,
turn the dough out onto a floured surface and let it rest for 10 minutes.
4. Roll the dough to a generous 1/4 inch thick and cut into 2-inch squares.
5. Cover the squares with a clean towel and let rise for 30 minutes.
6. In a medium-sized clean paper bag, add powdered sugar.
7. Lay out paper towels to drain the doughnuts.
8. Heat 1 to 1 1/2 inches of oil to 375°F. Add only a few at a time; otherwise,
the oil may cool too much.
9. Gently brush the uncooked squares with a little flour, then slide them into the heated oil.
10. When they pop to the surface, spoon hot oil over them constantly until they are puffed.
11. Turn the squares and cook until they are a light golden color on both sides.
This should take 1 to 2 minutes.
12. Check the first few squares for any uncooked dough inside.
13. Remove from hot oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
14. While warm, drop them into the bag with powdered sugar and shake until well coated.
15. Serve immediately.
